description: If comfort is on your mind, the reebok Twist sandals will transport you to heavenly bliss! Stylish, absolutely lightweight and super comfy, they will make you feel like you are walking on a bed of roses all day. Ruggedly crafted for casual wear, team them with jeans or shorts and step out in style.UpperLeather upper for rugged feel and styleOver-the-foot straps with foam at the bottom for added comfortBack strap to hold the foot firmly in placeBrand name on front and backMidsoleCushioned footbed for all-day comfortElevated ridges on footbed for a massage-like feelLeather lining for soft touch and moisture absorptionOutsoleRubber outsole provides durable traction on a variety of surfacesLugs on the periphery of the outsole for better tractionsandal careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
